comment: I was really pleased with the professionalism and responsiveness of Black Hill Landscaping. They were timely in providing an estimate, they got the job done in a satisfactory and timely way. Overall, very pleased and would highly recommend.
draft_response: Wyatt, we appreciate your review. Four stars tells us we are close but not perfect, and that matters to us. If you have specific feedback on how we can improve, please reach out directly at (817) 995-0324.
final_response: Thank you for taking the time to leave this review. Getting estimates out quickly and delivering quality work on schedule is what our team strives for on every landscaping project. Glad Black Hill Landscaping could deliver that for you.
